infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Testing Phase 4 (validating the solution document against Phase 1 requirements and producing the final architecture deliverable) requires the agent to have completed and accepted all of Phases 1, 2, and 3 as prior state. Providing synthetic accepted outputs for every prior phase would make the scenario unrealistically large and would pre-bake the artifacts the agent is supposed to produce, removing meaningful discriminating signal. This capability cannot be evaluated in a self-contained one-shot scenario within the eval sandbox constraints.
